_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of talent management practices for data and AI organizations, including workforce planning methodologies, skills gap analysis, hiring strategy, retention approaches, career path development, and succession planning.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. Knowledge LS-K-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-002 (OP, cosine: 0.518), LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.510).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.539). Shared vocabulary: [workforce]. NICE-only terms [managing, skill] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, analysis, approaches, career, data, development] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.890 (P=0.929, R=0.854). P exceeds R by 0.075 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 27 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Skill in managing a workforce" and "Knowledge of talent management practices for data and AI organizations, includin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.535 ≈ STS 0.539 (gap 0.004). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [workforce] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.5%. Shared tokens: [workforce]. NICE-only: [managing, skill]. WIDAI-only: [ai, analysis, approaches, career, data, development].
